metadata.description: Contoso Azure Monitor PoC — Deploys all custom workbooks to the Azure Monitor Workbook gallery. Requires an existing Log Analytics Workspace.
Name of the existing Log Analytics workspace.
Resource group containing the existing Log Analytics workspace.
Azure region for the workbook resources.
Unique GUID for Server Health Overview workbook.
Unique GUID for Performance Deep Dive workbook.
Unique GUID for Security & Compliance Audit workbook.
Unique GUID for Windows Services Monitoring workbook.
Unique GUID for Alert Overview & Operations workbook.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Server Health Overview
---
Consolidated view of server health across your Azure Arc-enabled and Azure VM estate. Replicates the SCOM State dashboard.

**Data Sources:** Heartbeat, Perf (via AMA + DCRs)"},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"a2947a42-89c1-4b10-8c31-0e9e70e0c536","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","label":"Time Range","type":4,"isRequired":true,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000,"isInitialTime":true},{"durationMs":172800000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"value":{"durationMs":86400000}},{"id":"b3f58a52-7c22-4d11-9e42-1f0e80f1d637","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"Computer","label":"Server","type":2,"isRequired":false,"multiSelect":true,"quote":"'","delimiter":",","query":"Heartbeat
| distinct Computer
| sort by Computer asc","typeSettings":{"additionalResourceOptions":["value::all"],"showDefault":false},"defaultValue":"value::all","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Server Availability"},"name":"section-availability"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Heartbeat
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, OSType, ResourceGroup
| extend Status = iff(LastHeartbeat < ago(5m), '🔴 Offline', '🟢 Online')
| extend MinutesSinceHeartbeat = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastHeartbeat)
| project Computer, Status, ['Last Heartbeat'] = LastHeartbeat, ['Minutes Ago'] = MinutesSinceHeartbeat, ['OS Type'] = OSType, ['Resource Group'] = ResourceGroup
| sort by Status asc, Computer asc","size":0,"title":"Server Status — Heartbeat Based","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"server-status-table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Heartbeat
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend Status = iff(LastHeartbeat < ago(5m), 'Offline', 'Online')
| summarize Count = count() by Status","size":3,"title":"Availability Summary","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"Online","color":"green"},{"seriesName":"Offline","color":"red"}]}},"name":"availability-pie"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Performance Summary — Current State"},"name":"section-perf-summary"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let cpu = Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Processor' and CounterName == '% Processor Time' and InstanceName == '_Total'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 1), MaxCPU = round(max(CounterValue), 1) by Computer;
let mem = Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Memory' and CounterName == 'Available MBytes'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgAvailMB = round(avg(CounterValue), 0) by Computer;
let disk = Perf
| where ObjectName == 'LogicalDisk' and CounterName == '% Free Space'
| where InstanceName !in ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize MinFree = round(min(CounterValue), 1) by Computer;
cpu
| join kind=leftouter mem on Computer
| join kind=leftouter disk on Computer
| project Computer, ['Avg CPU %'] = AvgCPU, ['Max CPU %'] = MaxCPU, ['Avail Memory MB'] = AvgAvailMB, ['Min Disk Free %'] = MinFree
| sort by ['Avg CPU %'] desc","size":0,"title":"Server Performance At-a-Glance","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"perf-summary-table"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## CPU Usage Trend"},"name":"section-cpu"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Processor' and CounterName == '% Processor Time' and InstanceName == '_Total'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"CPU % Processor Time by Server","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"cpu-timechart"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Memory Usage Trend"},"name":"section-memory"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Memory' and CounterName == 'Available MBytes'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgAvailMB = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Available Memory (MB) by Server","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"memory-timechart"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Disk Free Space"},"name":"section-disk"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'LogicalDisk' and CounterName == '% Free Space'
| where InstanceName !in ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgFreePercent = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer, InstanceName
| sort by AvgFreePercent asc
| render barchart","size":0,"title":"Disk Free Space % by Volume","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"disk-free-barchart"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Network Throughput"},"name":"section-network"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Network Interface' and CounterName == 'Bytes Total/sec'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgBytesPerSec = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend AvgMbps = round(AvgBytesPerSec * 8 / 1000000, 2)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, AvgMbps
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Network Throughput (Mbps) by Server","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"network-timechart"}],"fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"custom-contoso-server-health-overview","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}

{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Performance Deep Dive
---
Detailed performance analysis for CPU, memory, disk I/O, and processor queue length.

**Data Sources:** Perf (via AMA + DCR: dcr-contoso-perf-counters)"},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"c1d47a42-89c1-4b10-8c31-0e9e70e0c001","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","label":"Time Range","type":4,"isRequired":true,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000,"isInitialTime":true},{"durationMs":172800000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"value":{"durationMs":86400000}},{"id":"d2e58a52-7c22-4d11-9e42-1f0e80f1d002","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"Computer","label":"Server","type":2,"isRequired":false,"multiSelect":true,"quote":"'","delimiter":",","query":"Heartbeat
| distinct Computer
| sort by Computer asc","typeSettings":{"additionalResourceOptions":["value::all"],"showDefault":false},"defaultValue":"value::all","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## CPU Analysis"},"name":"section-cpu"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Processor' and CounterName == '% Processor Time' and InstanceName == '_Total'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 1), P50 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 50), 1), P90 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 90), 1), P95 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 95), 1), MaxCPU = round(max(CounterValue), 1), Samples = count() by Computer
| sort by AvgCPU desc","size":0,"title":"CPU Utilization Statistics","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"cpu-stats"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Processor' and CounterName == '% Processor Time' and InstanceName == '_Total'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"CPU % Processor Time — Trend","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"cpu-trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'System' and CounterName == 'Processor Queue Length'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgQueueLen = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Processor Queue Length (> 2 = CPU bottleneck)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"cpu-queue-trend"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Memory Analysis"},"name":"section-memory"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Memory' and CounterName == 'Available MBytes'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgAvailMB = round(avg(CounterValue), 0), MinAvailMB = round(min(CounterValue), 0), P5 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 5), 0), MaxAvailMB = round(max(CounterValue), 0) by Computer
| sort by MinAvailMB asc","size":0,"title":"Memory Availability Statistics (MB)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"memory-stats"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Memory' and CounterName == 'Available MBytes'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgAvailMB = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Available Memory (MB) — Trend","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"memory-trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Memory' and CounterName == 'Pages/sec'
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgPagesPerSec = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Memory Pages/sec (high = memory pressure)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"memory-pages-trend"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Disk I/O Analysis"},"name":"section-disk"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'LogicalDisk' and CounterName == '% Free Space'
| where InstanceName !in ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgFree = round(avg(CounterValue), 1), MinFree = round(min(CounterValue), 1) by Computer, InstanceName
| sort by MinFree asc","size":0,"title":"Disk Free Space % by Volume","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"disk-space"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'LogicalDisk' and CounterName in ('Avg. Disk sec/Read', 'Avg. Disk sec/Write')
| where InstanceName !in ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgLatencyMs = round(avg(CounterValue) * 1000, 2) by Computer, InstanceName, CounterName
| sort by AvgLatencyMs desc","size":0,"title":"Disk Latency (ms) — >25ms warning, >50ms critical","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"disk-latency"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'LogicalDisk' and CounterName == 'Avg. Disk Queue Length'
| where InstanceName !in ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgQueueLen = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, InstanceName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Disk Queue Length (> 2 = disk bottleneck)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"disk-queue"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Network Analysis"},"name":"section-network"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Network Interface' and CounterName in ('Bytes Sent/sec', 'Bytes Received/sec')
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize AvgBytesPerSec = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, CounterName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend Mbps = round(AvgBytesPerSec * 8 / 1000000, 2)
| project TimeGenerated, Series = strcat(Computer, ' - ', CounterName), Mbps
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Network Sent/Received (Mbps)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"network-trend"}],"fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"custom-contoso-performance-deep-dive","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}

{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Security & Compliance Audit
---
Monitors privileged group membership changes, account lockouts, failed logons, user account lifecycle, and audit policy modifications.

**Data Sources:** SecurityEvent (via AMA + DCR: dcr-contoso-security-events)"},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"e1f47a42-89c1-4b10-8c31-0e9e70e0c101","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","label":"Time Range","type":4,"isRequired":true,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000,"isInitialTime":true},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"value":{"durationMs":86400000}}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Privileged Group Membership Changes
Event IDs: 4728/4729 (global), 4732/4733 (local), 4756/4757 (universal), 4735/4737/4755 (group modified)"},"name":"section-group-changes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4728, 4729, 4732, 4733, 4756, 4757, 4735, 4737, 4755)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, Activity, ['Target Group'] = TargetUserName, ['Member Changed'] = MemberName, ['Changed By'] = SubjectUserName, ['Changed By Domain'] = SubjectDomainName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Privileged Group Change Log","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"group-change-log"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4728, 4729, 4732, 4733, 4756, 4757)
| summarize Changes = count() by TargetUserName
| sort by Changes desc
| render barchart","size":0,"title":"Group Changes by Target Group","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"group-change-chart"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Account Lockouts
Event IDs: 4740 (locked), 4767 (unlocked)"},"name":"section-lockouts"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4740, 4767)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, Activity, ['Locked Account'] = TargetUserName, ['Domain'] = TargetDomainName, ['Source'] = IpAddress
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Account Lockout Events","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"lockout-table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4740
| summarize LockoutCount = count() by TargetUserName
| sort by LockoutCount desc
| take 20
| render barchart","size":0,"title":"Top 20 Locked-Out Accounts","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"lockout-topn"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Failed Logon Attempts
Event IDs: 4625 (logon failure), 4771 (Kerberos pre-auth failure)"},"name":"section-failed-logons"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4625, 4771)
| summarize FailedLogons = count() by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Failed Logon Attempts Over Time","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"failed-logon-trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, ['Target Account'] = TargetUserName, ['Source IP'] = IpAddress, ['Failure Reason'] = Activity, ['Logon Type'] = LogonType
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100","size":0,"title":"Recent Failed Logon Details (Last 100)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"failed-logon-detail"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize FailedLogons = count() by IpAddress
| sort by FailedLogons desc
| take 20
| render barchart","size":0,"title":"Top 20 Source IPs with Failed Logons","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"failed-logon-source-ip"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## User Account Lifecycle
Event IDs: 4720 (created), 4722 (enabled), 4723 (password change attempt), 4724 (password reset), 4725 (disabled), 4726 (deleted)"},"name":"section-user-lifecycle"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4720, 4722, 4723, 4724, 4725, 4726)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, Activity, ['Target Account'] = TargetUserName, ['Performed By'] = SubjectUserName, ['Performer Domain'] = SubjectDomainName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"User Account Changes","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"user-lifecycle"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Audit Policy Changes
Event IDs: 4719 (audit policy changed), 4907 (auditing settings changed)"},"name":"section-audit"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4719, 4907)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, Activity, ['Changed By'] = SubjectUserName, ['Domain'] = SubjectDomainName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Audit Policy Modification Log","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"audit-policy"}],"fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"custom-contoso-security-audit","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}

{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Windows Services Monitoring
---
Tracks critical Windows service state changes (start/stop/crash) to replace SCOM service monitors.

**Data Sources:** Event (via AMA + DCR: dcr-contoso-windows-events)"},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"f1a47a42-89c1-4b10-8c31-0e9e70e0c201","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","label":"Time Range","type":4,"isRequired":true,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000,"isInitialTime":true},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"value":{"durationMs":86400000}},{"id":"g2b58a52-7c22-4d11-9e42-1f0e80f1d202","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"Computer","label":"Server","type":2,"isRequired":false,"multiSelect":true,"quote":"'","delimiter":",","query":"Heartbeat
| distinct Computer
| sort by Computer asc","typeSettings":{"additionalResourceOptions":["value::all"],"showDefault":false},"defaultValue":"value::all","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Critical Service Current State"},"name":"section-state"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Event
| where EventLog == 'System' and Source == 'Service Control Manager' and EventID == 7036
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| parse EventData with * '<Data Name="param1">' ServiceName '</Data><Data Name="param2">' ServiceState '</Data>' *
| where ServiceName in ('DHCP Server', 'CcmExec', 'SMS_EXECUTIVE', 'W32Time', 'DNS', 'NTDS', 'Netlogon', 'DFSR', 'IsmServ', 'Kdc', 'LanmanServer', 'LanmanWorkstation', 'WinRM')
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer, ServiceName
| extend Status = iff(ServiceState =~ 'running', '🟢 Running', '🔴 Stopped')
| project Computer, ['Service Name'] = ServiceName, Status, ['Last Change'] = TimeGenerated
| sort by Status desc, Computer asc","size":0,"title":"Critical Service Status","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"critical-services"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Service Stop Events"},"name":"section-stops"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Event
| where EventLog == 'System' and Source == 'Service Control Manager' and EventID == 7036
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| parse EventData with * '<Data Name="param1">' ServiceName '</Data><Data Name="param2">' ServiceState '</Data>' *
| where ServiceState =~ 'stopped'
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, ServiceName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Service Stop Events","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"service-stops"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Event
| where EventLog == 'System' and Source == 'Service Control Manager' and EventID == 7036
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| parse EventData with * '<Data Name="param1">' ServiceName '</Data><Data Name="param2">' ServiceState '</Data>' *
| where ServiceState =~ 'stopped'
| summarize StopCount = count() by ServiceName
| sort by StopCount desc
| take 20
| render barchart","size":0,"title":"Top 20 Most Frequently Stopped Services","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"stop-topn"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Service Crashes (EventID 7034) & New Installs (EventID 7045)"},"name":"section-crashes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Event
| where EventLog == 'System' and Source == 'Service Control Manager' and EventID == 7034
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, RenderedDescription
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Unexpected Service Terminations","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"crashes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Event
| where EventLog == 'System' and Source == 'Service Control Manager' and EventID == 7045
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, RenderedDescription
| sort by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"New Service Installations","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"new-services"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Service Event Timeline"},"name":"section-timeline"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Event
| where EventLog == 'System' and Source == 'Service Control Manager'
| where EventID in (7034, 7036, 7040, 7045)
| where Computer in ({Computer}) or '{Computer}' == 'value::all'
| summarize EventCount = count() by EventID, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| extend EventType = case(EventID == 7034, '7034 - Crash', EventID == 7036, '7036 - State Change', EventID == 7040, '7040 - Start Type Change', EventID == 7045, '7045 - New Service', tostring(EventID))
| project TimeGenerated, EventType, EventCount
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Service Control Manager Events Over Time","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"timeline"}],"fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"custom-contoso-windows-services","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}

{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Alert Overview & Operational Dashboard
---
Consolidated view of fired alerts, Windows error/warning events, and data ingestion health.

**Data Sources:** Heartbeat, Event, Perf, Usage"},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"h1c47a42-89c1-4b10-8c31-0e9e70e0c301","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","label":"Time Range","type":4,"isRequired":true,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000,"isInitialTime":true},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"value":{"durationMs":86400000}}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Environment Health"},"name":"section-health"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend Status = iff(LastHeartbeat < ago(5m), 'Offline', 'Online')
| summarize Online = countif(Status == 'Online'), Offline = countif(Status == 'Offline'), Total = count()
| project ['Total Servers'] = Total, Online, Offline","size":3,"title":"Server Fleet Status","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true}},"name":"fleet-status"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Windows Event Errors & Warnings"},"name":"section-events"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Event
| where EventLog in ('Application', 'System')
| where EventLevelName in ('Error', 'Warning', 'Critical')
| summarize EventCount = count() by EventLevelName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Error & Warning Events Over Time","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"events-trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Event
| where EventLog in ('Application', 'System')
| where EventLevelName in ('Error', 'Critical')
| summarize EventCount = count() by Source, EventID, EventLog
| sort by EventCount desc
| take 25
| project ['Event Source'] = Source, ['Event ID'] = EventID, ['Log'] = EventLog, ['Count'] = EventCount","size":0,"title":"Top 25 Error/Critical Events by Source","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"top-errors"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Event
| where EventLog in ('Application', 'System')
| where EventLevelName in ('Error', 'Critical')
| summarize EventCount = count() by Computer
| sort by EventCount desc
| take 20
| render barchart","size":0,"title":"Servers with Most Errors","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"errors-by-server"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Servers Breaching Performance Thresholds"},"name":"section-thresholds"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let cpuBreach = Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Processor' and CounterName == '% Processor Time' and InstanceName == '_Total'
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer
| where AvgCPU > 85
| extend Metric = 'CPU %', Value = tostring(AvgCPU), Severity = iff(AvgCPU > 95, '🔴 Critical', '🟡 Warning');
let memBreach = Perf
| where ObjectName == 'Memory' and CounterName == 'Available MBytes'
| summarize AvgMB = round(avg(CounterValue), 0) by Computer
| where AvgMB < 1024
| extend Metric = 'Avail Memory MB', Value = tostring(AvgMB), Severity = iff(AvgMB < 500, '🔴 Critical', '🟡 Warning');
let diskBreach = Perf
| where ObjectName == 'LogicalDisk' and CounterName == '% Free Space'
| where InstanceName !in ('_Total', 'HarddiskVolume1')
| summarize MinFree = round(min(CounterValue), 1) by Computer
| where MinFree < 15
| extend Metric = 'Disk Free %', Value = tostring(MinFree), Severity = iff(MinFree < 10, '🔴 Critical', '🟡 Warning');
cpuBreach
| union memBreach
| union diskBreach
| project Computer, Metric, Value, Severity
| sort by Severity asc, Computer asc","size":0,"title":"Servers Exceeding Thresholds (CPU >85%, Memory <1GB, Disk <15%)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"threshold-breaches"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Data Ingestion Health"},"name":"section-ingestion"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Usage
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize DataIngested_MB = round(sum(Quantity), 2) by DataType
| sort by DataIngested_MB desc","size":0,"title":"Data Ingestion by Table (Last 24h, MB)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"ingestion-table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Usage
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize DataIngested_MB = round(sum(Quantity), 2) by DataType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Daily Ingestion Trend (Last 7 Days)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"ingestion-trend"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Agent Health"},"name":"section-agent"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated), HeartbeatCount = count() by Computer, Category, OSType, Version
| extend AgentStatus = iff(LastHeartbeat < ago(5m), '🔴 Stale', '🟢 Active')
| project Computer, AgentStatus, ['Agent Type'] = Category, ['OS'] = OSType, ['Agent Version'] = Version, ['Last Heartbeat'] = LastHeartbeat, ['Heartbeats'] = HeartbeatCount
| sort by AgentStatus asc, Computer asc","size":0,"title":"Agent Health & Version","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"agent-health"}],"fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"custom-contoso-alert-overview","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
